positive: A stylized, neo-tribal celestial fox embracing a crescent moon and shooting stars. The fox silhouette is highly detailed, rendered in negative space or line-art fashion against a vibrant, deep indigo and emerald green cosmic background. Composition is centrally focused, with the fox looking majestic and ethereal. Use strong linework, dot-work elements, and geometric sacred geometry accents to frame the scene. Style should be a harmonious blend of modern tattoo flash art, psychedelic minimalism, and detailed Alphonse Mucha-inspired celestial motifs. Clean edges, high contrast, perfect symmetry, printable vector quality. Dramatic, cinematic, moody, luminous.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, lowres, worst quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy composition, logos, copyrighted, signature, grain, noise
